receptionist:greeting_message: Welcome to Contoso. Please say the full name of the person you would like to speak to.
receptionist:noanswer_message: I'm sorry, I couldn't find that person in our directory. Let me transfer you to our reception team.
receptionist:afterhours_message: Thank you for calling Contoso. Our office is currently closed. Our business hours are Monday to Friday, 8:30am to 5:30pm. Please call back during business hours.
_comment_acs_callback_url: IMPORTANT: This URL must include ?code=YOUR-FUNCTION-KEY. ACS mid-call events (RecognizeCompleted, PlayCompleted, TransferAccepted etc.) POST to this URL. Without the function key, ACS receives HTTP 401 and the bot will answer calls but never process speech or complete transfers. Retrieve the key from: Azure Portal > Function App > App keys > default, or via the Kudu SCM API.
